FAQ
zkCRO is Cronos zkEVM’s native yield bearing token. Backed by staked CRO, zkCRO earns yield through transaction fees paid on the Cronos PoS chain.
Once Cronos zkEVM Mainnet has launched zkCRO will be air dropped into your wallet on Cronos zkEVM.
You will receive zkCRO according to the CRO:zkCRO exchange rate. The expected amount of zkCRO you will receive is shown on the website.
By participating in the Cronos zkEVM passage you can earn points as part of the the Pioneer Program and start earning zkCRO yield immediately.
Yes you can deposit CRO held on Cronos EVM. Depositing CRO or LCRO on Cronos EVM through the Cronos zkEVM Passage is the only opportunity to transfer CRO or LCRO directly from Cronos EVM to Cronos zkEVM.
During the campaign period you can deposit CRO & LCRO on Cronos zkEVM and receive zkCRO when Cronos zkEVM Mainnet launches. After the Cronos zkEVM Passage has ended you will not be able to bridge any further CRO or LCRO from Cronos EVM to Cronos zkEVM.
The tokens you can deposit depends on the selected network. On Ethereum you can deposit CRO. On Cronos EVM you can deposit CRO and LCRO.
On Ethereum you can buy CRO on .
On Cronos EVM you can buy CRO on .
If you have deposited CRO or LCRO during the Cronos zkEVM Passage you will receive your points after the launch of the Cronos zkEVM Mainnet when the Cronos zkEVM Pioneer Program
 goes live.
The zkCRO exchange rate determines how much CRO each zkCRO is worth. As zkCRO accrues staking yield over time, each zkCRO can be exchanged for more CRO.
